{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR & Admin Officer",
  "description": "Rexobe Consult - Our client in the business compliance industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR &amp; Admin Officer

Job Location: Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Business Compliance Services
Work Schedule: Monday &ndash; Friday, 8:00 AM &ndash; 5:00 PM
Resumption: Within 2&ndash;3 Weeks

Description


	Our client is seeking a highly organized and proactive HR &amp; Admin Officer to support the company&#39;s human resource and administrative functions.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing employee records, coordinating HR processes, supporting office administration, and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations.


Responsibilities


	Manage recruitment, onboarding, and employee documentation processes
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR databases
	Support performance management and employee engagement initiatives
	Assist with the implementation of HR policies and procedures
	Coordinate staff attendance, leave records, and other HR-related reports
	Handle office administration and ensure efficient office operations
	Manage correspondence, filing systems, and documentation
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and administrative activities
	Support management with HR and administrative reporting
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements


Requirements


	Minimum of HND or Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in HR and administrative functions
	Sound knowledge of HR processes and office administration
	Strong organizational and time-management skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, and PowerPoint)
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information professionally
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills
	Must reside in or around Ipaja, Lagos
	Must be available to resume within 2&ndash;3 weeks.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: rexobe.recruitment@gmail.com using &quot;HR &amp; Admin Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

HR & Admin Officer Job at Rexobe Consult




        
    

        
        Rexobe Consult - Our client in the business compliance industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR & Admin Officer

Job Location: Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Business Compliance Services
Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Resumption: Within 2–3 Weeks

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is seeking a highly organized and proactive HR & Admin Officer to support the company's human resource and administrative functions.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing employee records, coordinating HR processes, supporting office administration, and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations.


Responsibilities


	Manage recruitment, onboarding, and employee documentation processes
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR databases
	Support performance management and employee engagement initiatives
	Assist with the implementation of HR policies and procedures
	Coordinate staff attendance, leave records, and other HR-related reports
	Handle office administration and ensure efficient office operations
	Manage correspondence, filing systems, and documentation
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and administrative activities
	Support management with HR and administrative reporting
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements


Requirements


	Minimum of HND or Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
	1–3 years of experience in HR and administrative functions
	Sound knowledge of HR processes and office administration
	Strong organizational and time-management skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, and PowerPoint)
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information professionally
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills
	Must reside in or around Ipaja, Lagos
	Must be available to resume within 2–3 weeks.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "HR & Admin Officer" as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer & Video Editor",
  "description": "Rexobe Consult - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer &amp; Video Editor
Job Location: Idimu, Lagos

Description


	Our client is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphics Designer &amp; Video Editor to create engaging visual content for digital platforms.
	The ideal candidate should have a good eye for design, basic video editing skills, and the ability to deliver creative content within deadlines.


Responsibilities


	Design creative graphics for social media, flyers, banners, and promotional materials
	Edit and produce short videos and reels for digital platforms
	Create visually appealing content that aligns with brand identity
	Collaborate with the team on content ideas and campaigns
	Ensure timely delivery of designs and edited videos
	Maintain organized design files and media assets
	Perform basic motion graphics and video transitions when necessary
	Stay updated with current design and social media trends


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / NCE qualification
	Basic knowledge of graphic design and video editing tools
	Proficiency in tools such as Canva, CorelDRAW, Photoshop, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar software
	Creative thinking and attention to detail
	Ability to meet deadlines and work independently
	Good communication and teamwork skills
	Entry-level candidates with strong portfolios are encouraged to apply
	Ability to work on-site in Idimu, Lagos.


Salary
N70,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: rexobe.recruitment@gmail.com using &quot;Graphics / Video Editor&quot; as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

Graphics Designer & Video Editor Job at Rexobe Consult




        
    

        
        Rexobe Consult - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer & Video Editor
Job Location: Idimu, Lagos

Description


	Our client is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Graphics Designer & Video Editor to create engaging visual content for digital platforms.
	The ideal candidate should have a good eye for design, basic video editing skills, and the ability to deliver creative content within deadlines.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Design creative graphics for social media, flyers, banners, and promotional materials
	Edit and produce short videos and reels for digital platforms
	Create visually appealing content that aligns with brand identity
	Collaborate with the team on content ideas and campaigns
	Ensure timely delivery of designs and edited videos
	Maintain organized design files and media assets
	Perform basic motion graphics and video transitions when necessary
	Stay updated with current design and social media trends


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / NCE qualification
	Basic knowledge of graphic design and video editing tools
	Proficiency in tools such as Canva, CorelDRAW, Photoshop, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar software
	Creative thinking and attention to detail
	Ability to meet deadlines and work independently
	Good communication and teamwork skills
	Entry-level candidates with strong portfolios are encouraged to apply
	Ability to work on-site in Idimu, Lagos.


Salary
N70,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Graphics / Video Editor" as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Civil Engineer Job at Elizabeth Maddeux




        
    

        
        Elizabeth Maddeux - Our client seeks a skilled and proactive candidates to lead the planning, design, and supervision of construction and infrastructure projects from concept to completion in the capacity below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	This role combines core civil engineering responsibilities with technical support and technical sales functions, requiring the ability to interpret engineering requirements, provide on-site and remote technical guidance, and support client-facing technical discussions that influence project decisions and solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and review engineering designs, drawings, cost estimates, and feasibility studies in compliance with relevant standards and regulations.
	Provide technical support and advisory services to project teams, contractors, and stakeholders, including real-time troubleshooting of engineering issues.
	Support technical sales and client engagement by contributing to proposals, client meetings, and translating requirements into engineering solutions.
	Supervise site activities to ensure adherence to approved designs, quality standards, and construction specifications.
	Enforce QA/QC procedures and ensure compliance with health, safety, environmental, and regulatory requirements.
	Monitor project progress, budgets, and resource utilization while supporting procurement and vendor evaluation.
	Prepare technical reports, documentation, and progress updates, and act as a liaison between site teams, management, and clients.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering.
	3 – 5 years of relevant experience in construction, infrastructure, or structural engineering projects.
	Professional certification or registration with COREN is an added advantage.
	Experience in technical sales, client-facing engineering, or technical solution support is highly desirable.
	Proficiency in engineering design and CAD software.
	Strong knowledge of safety regulations, building codes, and quality standards.
	Proven ability to provide technical support, troubleshooting, and engineering guidance.
	Strong communication skills with ability to engage both technical and non-technical stakeholders.


Core Competencies:


	Structural design and analysis
	Project planning and coordination
	Budget monitoring and cost control
	Site supervision and contractor management
	Technical support and problem resolution
	Technical sales and solution communication
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 / Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their Resume and Cover letter to: [email protected] using "Civil Engineer" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Staff Verification Officer",
  "description": "Whip Smart Service Providers Limited specialize in recruiting, and management of domestic staff. We provide the public with the best and affordable household services, Nanny and house keeping services, professionally trained caregivers who care for the aged and those requiring special care, janitors and licensed nurses to uphold the company&#39;s preeminence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Staff Verification Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a meticulous Staff Verification Specialist to join our team in Ikeja.
	In this role, you will be responsible for conducting background checks and verifying the credentials and personal details of prospective staff, ensuring that all new hires meet the organization&rsquo;s standards.
	You will be crucial in confirming the accuracy of employment histories, addresses, criminal records, and educational qualifications to support the recruitment process.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct comprehensive background checks, including identity verification, address verification, criminal records, and employment history.
	Verify academic qualifications and certifications.
	Liaise with candidates, references, previous employers, and educational institutions for verification purposes.
	Ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements during the verification process.
	Maintain accurate documentation of all verification results and flag discrepancies when needed.
	Provide detailed reports to HR and management on verification outcomes.
	Handle candidate inquiries and resolve verification discrepancies professionally.
	Stay updated on industry standards and legal regulations regarding background checks.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in background verification, HR compliance, or similar roles.
	In-depth knowledge of background check processes and legal requirements for employment verification.
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication skills and the ability to interact effectively with internal teams and external contacts.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and background screening software.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: whipsmartrecruitment@gmail.com using &quot;Staff Verification Specialist&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Staff Verification Officer Job at Whip Smart Service Providers Limited




        
    

        
        Whip Smart Service Providers Limited specialize in recruiting, and management of domestic staff. We provide the public with the best and affordable household services, Nanny and house keeping services, professionally trained caregivers who care for the aged and those requiring special care, janitors and licensed nurses to uphold the company's preeminence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Staff Verification Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a meticulous Staff Verification Specialist to join our team in Ikeja.
	In this role, you will be responsible for conducting background checks and verifying the credentials and personal details of prospective staff, ensuring that all new hires meet the organization’s standards.
	You will be crucial in confirming the accuracy of employment histories, addresses, criminal records, and educational qualifications to support the recruitment process.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct comprehensive background checks, including identity verification, address verification, criminal records, and employment history.
	Verify academic qualifications and certifications.
	Liaise with candidates, references, previous employers, and educational institutions for verification purposes.
	Ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements during the verification process.
	Maintain accurate documentation of all verification results and flag discrepancies when needed.
	Provide detailed reports to HR and management on verification outcomes.
	Handle candidate inquiries and resolve verification discrepancies professionally.
	Stay updated on industry standards and legal regulations regarding background checks.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in background verification, HR compliance, or similar roles.
	In-depth knowledge of background check processes and legal requirements for employment verification.
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication skills and the ability to interact effectively with internal teams and external contacts.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and background screening software.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Staff Verification Specialist" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
